title: Man-in-the-Middle Attack Process
description: A visual representation of how a Man-in-the-Middle (MitM) attacker intercepts and potentially alters communication between two trusted parties.
relationships: Attacker positions themself between Client and Server
Attacker intercepts and reads Client's Request intended for Server
Attacker may alter Request and forward a Forged version to Server
Attacker intercepts Server's Response intended for Client
Attacker may alter Response and forward a Forged version to Client
Client and Server believe they are communicating directly with each other
